name: @mirepoix/understand
description: Mirepoix-native codebase comprehension orchestrator. Wraps Lum1104s Understand-Anything multi-agent pipeline using @mirepoix/acp parallel sessions on local Qwen instead of Claude Code Task tool dispatch. Output is schema-compatible with the upstream Understand-Anything React dashboard. First building block of @mirepoix/modernize.
